mapper.sql:
AND p.board_gbn_cd = '04' AND p.del_yn = 'N'
AND p.board_cat_gbn_cd = #{boardCatGbnCd}
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.board_cat_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, p.comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, '관리자') AS nickname, cat.code_nm AS cat_nm, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_FILE f WHERE f.post_no = p.post_no AND f.del_yn = 'N') AS file_cnt, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(f.download_cnt), 0) FROM BRD_POST_FILE f WHERE f.post_no = p.post_no AND f.del_yn = 'N') AS total_download_cnt, (SELECT t.file_path FROM BRD_POST_FILE_THUMB t JOIN BRD_POST_FILE f2 ON f2.file_no = t.file_no WHERE f2.post_no = p.post_no AND f2.del_yn = 'N' AND t.thumb_typ_cd = '01' ORDER BY t.thumb_no ASC LIMIT 1) AS thumb_file_path FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no LEFT JOIN COM_CODE_DTL cat ON cat.code_grp_id = 'C014' AND cat.code_id = p.board_cat_gbn_cd AND cat.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY p.post_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_MST p WHERE 1=1

SELECT p.post_no, p.board_gbn_cd, p.board_cat_gbn_cd, p.member_no, p.title, p.content, p.view_cnt, p.like_cnt, p.dislike_cnt, p.comment_cnt, p.approval_yn, p.del_yn, p.create_ts, p.update_ts, COALESCE(m.nickname, '관리자') AS nickname, cat.code_nm AS cat_nm FROM BRD_POST_MST p LEFT JOIN MEM_JOIN_INFO m ON m.member_no = p.member_no LEFT JOIN COM_CODE_DTL cat ON cat.code_grp_id = 'C014' AND cat.code_id = p.board_cat_gbn_cd AND cat.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE p.post_no = #{postNo} AND p.board_gbn_cd = '04' AND p.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_MST (board_gbn_cd, board_cat_gbn_cd, member_no, title, content, view_cnt, like_cnt, dislike_cnt, comment_cnt, reg_ip, approval_yn, del_yn) VALUES ('04', #{boardCatGbnCd}, #{memberNo}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{regIp}, 'Y', 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, board_cat_gbn_cd = #{boardCatGbnCd}, update_ts = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND board_gbn_cd = '04' AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET del_yn = 'Y', del_ts = NOW() WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND board_gbn_cd = '04'
UPDATE BRD_POST_MST SET view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_FILE (post_no, version_nm, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, file_size, file_ext, download_cnt, latest_yn, del_yn) VALUES (#{postNo}, #{versionNm}, #{orgFileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, 0, #{latestYn}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT file_no, post_no, version_nm, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, file_size, file_ext, download_cnt, latest_yn, del_yn, create_ts FROM BRD_POST_FILE WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY file_no DESC

SELECT file_no, post_no, version_nm, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, file_size, file_ext, download_cnt, latest_yn, del_yn, create_ts FROM BRD_POST_FILE WHERE file_no = #{fileNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE BRD_POST_FILE SET download_cnt = download_cnt + 1 WHERE file_no = #{fileNo}
UPDATE BRD_POST_FILE SET del_yn = 'Y' WHERE file_no = #{fileNo}
UPDATE BRD_POST_FILE SET del_yn = 'Y' WHERE post_no = #{postNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BRD_POST_FILE_THUMB (file_no, thumb_typ_cd, org_file_nm, save_file_nm, file_path, file_size, width, height) VALUES (#{fileNo}, #{thumbTypCd}, #{orgFileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height})
mapper.select: SELECT t.thumb_no, t.file_no, t.thumb_typ_cd, t.org_file_nm, t.save_file_nm, t.file_path, t.file_size, t.width, t.height, t.create_ts, c.code_nm AS thumb_typ_nm FROM BRD_POST_FILE_THUMB t LEFT JOIN COM_CODE_DTL c ON c.code_grp_id = 'C015' AND c.code_id = t.thumb_typ_cd AND c.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE t.file_no = #{fileNo} ORDER BY t.thumb_no

SELECT t.thumb_no, t.file_no, t.thumb_typ_cd, t.org_file_nm, t.save_file_nm, t.file_path, t.file_size, t.width, t.height, t.create_ts, c.code_nm AS thumb_typ_nm FROM BRD_POST_FILE_THUMB t JOIN BRD_POST_FILE f ON f.file_no = t.file_no AND f.del_yn = 'N' LEFT JOIN COM_CODE_DTL c ON c.code_grp_id = 'C015' AND c.code_id = t.thumb_typ_cd AND c.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE f.post_no = #{postNo} ORDER BY t.thumb_typ_cd, t.thumb_no

SELECT t.thumb_no, t.file_no, t.thumb_typ_cd, t.org_file_nm, t.save_file_nm, t.file_path, t.file_size, t.width, t.height, t.create_ts FROM BRD_POST_FILE_THUMB t JOIN BRD_POST_FILE f ON f.file_no = t.file_no AND f.del_yn = 'N' WHERE f.post_no = #{postNo} AND t.thumb_typ_cd = '01' ORDER BY t.thumb_no ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BRD_POST_FILE f JOIN BRD_POST_MST p ON p.post_no = f.post_no WHERE p.board_gbn_cd = '04' AND p.del_yn = 'N' AND f.del_yn = 'N'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(f.download_cnt), 0) FROM BRD_POST_FILE f JOIN BRD_POST_MST p ON p.post_no = f.post_no WHERE p.board_gbn_cd = '04' AND p.del_yn = 'N' AND f.del_yn = 'N'
